channel.title: LaunchpadX
channel.description: Updates for LaunchpadX — the Launchpad replacement for macOS Tahoe.

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description:
LaunchpadX 1.2.1

Changed

  • Opening a folder now settles its icons in a gentle wave — the top row lands

first and each row below ripples in just behind it, instead of every icon

arriving at once. Closing collapses back the same way.

Fixed

  • The app could freeze completely on launch (clicks and shortcuts dead, force

quit required) when the updater hit an error behind the full-screen launcher.

Updater problems no longer block the app, and update windows now appear in

front of the launcher instead of invisibly behind it.

  • If the app ever stalled, it could take the whole Mac's keyboard and trackpad

down with it — only the cursor kept moving, and a restart was the only way

out. The app's shortcut and pinch listeners now run independently, so a

stall in the app can no longer freeze input for the rest of the Mac.
